logo_discovery_notes: Logo discovery ran and failed: the email-domain website gpplumbingltd.com returns a 202 bot or access block, and no logo was present on the verified Facebook page assets. With no logo, the palette is derived from the verified photos and the business name, per the colour rule.
open_design_palette_basis: Green from the business name and a calm trade tone. Brass from the real bath and shower fittings in the photos. Warm stone and ivory from the marble and tiled walls. Ink for legible text.
chosen_tone_of_voice: Assured, precise, premium, friendly, plain English
reason_for_design_choices: Open Design pilot direction swansea_atelier_deep_green_brass_editorial. The photos show high-end bathroom and kitchen renovations in marble, warm stone and brass, so the palette is grounded in the real images, and the deep green is motivated by the business name Greens. Cormorant Garamond with Outfit suits premium bathroom work and is distinct from every recent site. This deliberately diverges from Corvell (warm cream and terracotta bathroom) and from the earlier Greens template idea (forest green accent on cream, Fraunces and Inter, stacked hero).
inspired_by_template: none, bespoke from evidence (Corvell used only as an anti-clone reference to avoid)
image_selection_strategy: Diverse gallery: verified Facebook photos preferred over repetitive Google clusters (2 Facebook, max 2 per cluster)
location_validation_notes: Google address city (Swansea) differs from prospect region (Bristol). Site uses Google address city (Swansea), not prospect region (Bristol).
risks_or_manual_review_flags: Google address city (Swansea) differs from prospect region (Bristol)
Limited photo count: gallery kept compact
Multiple photos from same project detected; gallery capped per cluster
hero_headline: Precise plumbing, heating and beautiful bathrooms in Swansea
facebook_verification_reasons: Business name matches or clearly aliases Google listing
Location or service area matches Google address/city
Intro text matches trade and local area
facebook_design_notes: Verified Facebook page (https://www.facebook.com/GPPlumbingandHeatingLtd). 2 Facebook photo(s) selected from 10 found.
